narrative:
Richfield Township has 1,238 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
